name: AB Zemaitijos pienas
summary: AB Zemaitijos pienas produces and sells dairy products in Lithuania and internationally. The company's products include fermented cheese, pre-packaged cheese, processed cheese, cream, cream cheese, butter, dairy spreads, mixed spreads, milk fats, pasteurized cream, buttermilk, whey, and dried milk products. It also offers fresh dairy products, such as milk, cream, curd, yogurts, desserts, curd cheese, and glazed curd cheese. In addition, the company provides transportation and storage services.
